2603.28431.title: GeoHCC: Local Geometry-Aware Hierarchical Context Compression for 3D Gaussian Splatting
2603.28431.paper_summary: Although 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) enables high-fidelity real-time rendering, its prohibitive storage overhead severely hinders practical deployment. Recent anchor-based 3DGS compression schemes reduce redundancy through context modeling, yet overlook explicit geometric dependencies, leading to structural degradation and suboptimal rate-distortion performance. In this paper, we propose GeoHCC, a geometry-aware 3DGS compression framework that incorporates inter-anchor geometric correlations into anchor pruning and entropy coding for compact representation. We first introduce Neighborhood-Aware Anchor Pruning (NAAP), which evaluates anchor importance via weighted neighborhood feature aggregation and merges redundant anchors into salient neighbors, yielding a compact yet geometry-consistent anchor set. Building upon this optimized structure, we further develop a hierarchical entropy coding scheme, in which coarse-to-fine priors are exploited through a lightweight Geometry-Guided Convolution (GG-Conv) operator to enable spatially adaptive context modeling and rate-distortion optimization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GeoHCC effectively resolves the structure preservation bottleneck, maintaining superior geometric integrity and rendering fidelity over state-of-the-art anchor-based approaches.
2603.28431.paper_summary_zh: 儘管 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) 能夠實現高保真度的即時渲染，但其過高的儲存開銷嚴重阻礙了實際部署。最近的基於錨點的 3DGS 壓縮方案通過上下文建模來減少冗餘，然而卻忽視了明確的幾何依賴性，導致結構退化和次優的率-失真性能。在本文中，我們提出了 GeoHCC，一種幾何感知的 3DGS 壓縮框架，將錨點之間的幾何相關性納入錨點修剪和熵編碼，以實現緊湊的表示。我們首先介紹了鄰域感知錨點修剪 (NAAP)，該方法通過加權鄰域特徵聚合來評估錨點的重要性，並將冗餘的錨點合併為顯著的鄰居，從而產生一組緊湊且幾何一致的錨點。基於這一優化結構，我們進一步開發了一種層次熵編碼方案，其中通過輕量級的幾何引導卷積 (GG-Conv) 操作來利用粗到細的先驗，以實現空間自適應的上下文建模和率-失真優化。廣泛的實驗表明，GeoHCC 有效地解決了結構保持的瓶頸，保持了優越的幾何完整性和渲染保真度，超越了最先進的基於錨點的方法。
2603.28431.author: Xuan Deng et.al.
2603.28431.authors: Xuan Deng, Xiandong Meng, Hengyu Man, Qiang Zhu, Tiange Zhang, Debin Zhao, Xiaopeng Fan
